insight.headline: Deprecating useBuyerJourneyIntercept
insight.what_changed: The useBuyerJourneyIntercept hook on checkout UI extensions is deprecated as of version 2026-07. The block_progress capability it depends on is also deprecated. Existing extensions will continue to work on older versions but should be updated to ensure future compatibility.
insight.developer_impact: Developers should review their checkout UI extensions and update them to remove the useBuyerJourneyIntercept hook and the block_progress capability. They should also test their extensions on the latest version of the API to ensure they work as expected. The deprecation does not immediately break existing functionality but will in future versions, so proactive migration is recommended.
insight.merchant_impact: Merchants may notice changes in the behavior of checkout UI extensions as developers update them to comply with the deprecation. However, the impact should be minimal, and the changes are intended to improve the overall checkout experience.
insight.why_it_matters: This deprecation is part of Shopify's effort to improve the checkout experience and ensure that extensions are compatible with future updates. It's crucial for developers to stay up-to-date with these changes to provide the best experience for merchants and their customers.
insight.code_example: mutation { checkoutCreate(input: { lineItems: [{ variantId: "gid://graphql/Variant/123", quantity: 1 }] }) { checkout { id } } }

also_worth_knowing.text: Identity verification for Shopify Partners starts today
App Pricing: more plans, no-charge plan testing, and negative and fractional App Events
POS UI extensions 2026-07 uses per-unit fixed-amount line item discounts

updates.title: Identity verification for Shopify Partners starts today
updates.summary: Identity verification for Shopify Partners has started to ensure trust in the Shopify Partner ecosystem.

updates.title: App Pricing: more plans, no-charge plan testing, and negative and fractional App Events
updates.summary: App Pricing has been updated with more plans, no-charge plan testing, and support for negative and fractional App Events.

updates.title: POS UI extensions 2026-07 uses per-unit fixed-amount line item discounts
updates.summary: POS UI extensions now use per-unit fixed-amount line item discounts, requiring updates to existing implementations.

updates.title: Shopify Flow: Changes to Action extensions result in fewer breaking changes
updates.summary: Shopify Flow now handles breaking changes to Action extensions more gracefully, reducing validation failures.

updates.title: Shopify Flow: Action runtime URLs now update automatically
updates.summary: Shopify Flow now automatically updates Action runtime URLs, simplifying app redeployment and workflow management.
CLI version 4.4.0 has been released with updates to App Update, GCS bundle upload validation, and CLI fixes.

updates.title: Updated App Store Requirements: 1.3 Always Use Honest and Transparent Review Practices
updates.summary: Updated App Store Requirements emphasize honest and transparent review practices for all published apps.

updates.title: Customer Account API Customer.lastIncompleteCheckout and Checkout types removed in 2026-10
updates.summary: The Customer.lastIncompleteCheckout field and related Checkout types will be removed in Customer Account API version 2026-10.

updates.title: Markets APIs now support MarketRegionSubdivision
updates.summary: Markets APIs now support MarketRegionSubdivision, enabling more precise region-based market configurations.

updates.title: OrderDisplayFulfillmentStatus now returns FULFILLMENT_NOT_REQUIRED for orders with no items to fulfill
updates.summary: The OrderDisplayFulfillmentStatus enum now returns FULFILLMENT_NOT_REQUIRED for orders with no items to fulfill, starting in API version 2026-10.

updates.title: Deprecating the useBuyerJourneyIntercept API on checkout UI extensions
updates.summary: The useBuyerJourneyIntercept API on checkout UI extensions is deprecated, starting in version 2026-07, and will be removed in a future version.

updates.title: Shop Minis May June 2026 update
updates.summary: The Shop Minis May June 2026 update introduces new features, including product variant intents and typed hooks for selecting variants and sending buyers to express checkout.

recap.headline: Shopify updates App Pricing, POS UI extensions, and APIs

themes.title: App Pricing and Partners
themes.detail: Shopify has updated App Pricing to include more plans and no-charge plan testing. Additionally, identity verification for Shopify Partners has started to ensure trust in the ecosystem. Partners can now create up to 8 public plans and 15 private plans per app.

themes.title: API Updates
themes.detail: The Customer Account API has removed the deprecated Customer.lastIncompleteCheckout field and the Checkout type subtree. The Markets APIs now support MarketRegionSubdivision, and the OrderDisplayFulfillmentStatus enum can return a new value: FULFILLMENT_NOT_REQUIRED. POS UI extensions API version 2026-07 uses per-unit fixed-amount line item discounts.

themes.title: Shopify Flow and Development
themes.detail: Shopify Flow has made changes to Action extensions to reduce breaking changes, and Action runtime URLs now update automatically. The CLI has been updated to version 4.4.0 with changes to App Update and GCS bundle upload status validation.

actions.text: Update apps to use the new App Pricing features
Verify identity as a Shopify Partner
Review and update code to use the latest API versions
